Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man breaks his leg, Maxi uses a tracking device to locate a thief and a bunch of school kids run wild.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 12

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: The biggest mass rescue in years sees Bondi Beach closed. Nicola joins the team and leads a mass rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 02

Video.summary: Mouse accidentally turns off his radio, putting lives at risk. The shark alarm is set off.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 06

Video.summary: A miscommunication between lifeguards on the radio could cause serious problems in the water.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 09

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 11

Video.summary: Jethro takes on the toughest rescue of his career so far. Waves swamp the lifeguard 4WD buggy.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: A man falls off the jetski rescue mat. Crowds swell to 40,010 so Hoppo must decide whether to clear the water.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 01

Video.summary: A New Years Eve beach event with hundreds of participants leads the group directly into a rip.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 04

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: Trainee Lachie completes his first big solo rescue. The team farewell one of their most dedicated lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 08

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Tommy faces seaweed perils on the jetski. Chase and Will rush north on the jetski for a cliff fall.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 05

Video.summary: Spotlights illuminate World Pride Beach Party with 15,010 revelers. Hoppo marks 30 years on the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 11

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: Chappo makes a sprint to rescue a swimmer and Bagus keeps a nude photo shoot secret from the lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 03

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A mass rescue unfolds, Hoppo ties the knot, and trainees Glick and Jethro get a final chance to impress.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 13

Video.summary: Jethro rescues a man more than double his size, then accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 03

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: A local surf photographer aids in saving a tourist. 'Jewellery Rescue' search for a missing wedding ring.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 04

Video.summary: Students capture their own drowning on a GoPro. Maxi pursues a bag thief and Harries plays the bagpipes.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 11

Video.summary: An American tourist needs CPR after being pulled unconscious from the ocean in calm waters.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 01

Video.summary: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 05

Video.summary: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 08

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04

Video.summary: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 01

Video.summary: Monks go missing, a bluebottle sting turns serious and a young cancer patient becomes "lifeguard for the day".
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 07

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: A flasher's reported. Will and Bagus do continuous rescues. Jethro and Chase test a homemade throne in the surf.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 08

Video.summary: Hoppo and Evo face rescues on summer's hottest day. Newbies Matt and Noah are tested as their radio dies.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 05

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: A rough tackle halts a beach gridiron game. Harrison deals with bluebottles and a rat in the skate bowl.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 06
